title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Broadcom India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Broadcom India
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
